posts.author: D1D4K10
posts.content: @GSPGOAT123 that’s why they are doing Van vs Taira for the title and not Van vs Kape who deserves it more

posts.author: The Giraffe
posts.content: Manel Kape has also missed weight a couple times, had to pull out from injury, and was pulled from a fight for testing positive for Turinabol metabolites, while Taira's record on that sort of stuff is clean.  Taira being more reliable is a big factor.

posts.author: D1D4K10
Mazeflare
posts.content:
@D1D4K10 I understand your frustration completely, I share your sentiment for the most part, but as frustrated fan with the modern days UFC matchmaking, I'm definitelly fine with Taira getting the shot (not because I'm a big Taira fan, won't deny) but because Taira is developing his game on a incredibly high-rate to the point that even I counted him out on his last fight and the element of new generation versus new generation intrigues even more.

Gaethje vs Paddy? Atrocious.
Volk vs Lopes 2? Revolting.
Van vs Taira, in my humble opinion, right timing and amazing.

If you give the shot to Kape, there will be always uncertainty whether he will make it to the fight or not, plus, we would the boat on this incredible match-up with Van vs Taira. The UFC missed the boat with Jon Jones vs Anthony Johnson (R.I.P.), Jon Jones vs Francis Ngannou, Jon Jones vs Tom Aspinall, and low-key, Makhachev vs Topuria (at 170 it will not be competitive), this is an opportunity that shouldn't be missed.

* Edited at 02.16.2026,  2:10 PM ET *

posts.author: A_Person_05
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Song vs. Figueiredo
Yadong Song, DEC
Figgy is beyond washed. Yadong looked bad against O’Malley, but Figgy looked retired against Umar.

Zhang vs. Menifield
Mingyang Zhang, TKO, R1
Menifield sucks. Zhang bare minimum has power in his hands.

Pavlovich vs. Teixeira
Sergei Pavlovich, TKO, R1
Teixeira was getting boxed up by Tai for parts of that fight lol. He sucks. Pav should put him out in the first 2 minutes.

Perez vs. Sumudaerji
Alex Perez, TKO, R1

Asakura vs. Smotherman
Kai Asakura, DEC

Salikhov vs. Matthews
Muslim Salikhov, DEC

posts.author: A_Person_05
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Tsuruya vs. Aguilar
Rei Tsuruya, SUB, R1
I really like Tsuruya. It's like if you were building a character in a video game and said I'll be good by maxing out my stats on the random ******** nobody sees coming. He can't hit a double leg to save his life. But he will judo throw you into a headlock, or suplex you, or hit you with a lateral drop. And he can't get on the back and RNC a guy but he can spam twister attempts and go for keylocks and ****. It's really fun.

posts.author: A_Person_05
posts.content:
[Predictions]

@B7L7 And Yadong's striking looked bad. To be clear after watching that fight the conclusion I came to was that O'Malley and Yadong both looked terrible. Cory smokes both of them, Yan smokes either of them, Umar and Merab smoke both of them. Song specifically has looked like lost everything that made him a prospect on the rise over time. He rarely ever lands power shots with his hands anymore. He can't throw in combination. He went out there and tried to leg kick and clinch his way to a win. It was a bad performace.
